name: azama-skills
description: System Analyst tooling skills: documentation, PRD, and analysis workflows.

plugins.name: codebase-doc-generator
plugins.description: Thoroughly scan a codebase -> per-page feature documentation + user stories (epic per module, AC always included) + main and sub system flows as vertical swimlanes, packaged into a single .docx. Multi-stack, with an anti-assumption discipline.
